AppDescription.message: Membuang bar hitam daripada video pada skrin ultrawide (21:9, 32:9, dll) di mana-mana sahaja, termasuk YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, dll.

ImproveUs.message: Sila beritahu kami cara untuk menambah baik melalui e-mel

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Kami menghargai privasi anda dan menghormati EU GDPR. Sila semak & terima dasar privasi kami untuk mula menggunakan UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Sila tinggalkan ulasan untuk UltraWide Video di Chrome Web Store

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
